reviews.review_title: Punch VRX has a great potential! 🥊
reviews.review_description:
I've been testing VR boxing games for years, and Punch VRX shows real promise. The training area is fun and has nice features (though it still needs some polish), but I guess they keep working on this.

If updates keep coming, this could become a solid VR boxing experience.

Excited to see where it goes! Congrats to the creators for the new updates!!
There's only 3 opponents and can't play with other players and the AI always glitches out and digs itself into the floor and you can't even see your arms

Make it More graphical￼ Like you’re actually boxing
￼
Absolutely worst vr game doesn't even work. Do not buy this game.
This game dosen’t work and I cannot figure out how to get a refund, it also seem to interfere with some of my other games, I erased it and I do not reccomend this at all!
I think it’s a really good game but I don’t think it should start over every time you press a button

developer_response.body: Hi, If the feedback refers to a different aspect of the game where it restarts on button press unintentionally, please provide additional details. This information can help us diagnose the issue and identify potential solutions at info@skippyapps.com.

reviews.review_description: As I click agree when I play it freezes and doesn’t play

developer_response.body:
Hi 
Restart your device: This can sometimes resolve temporary glitches.
Ensure you have the latest update: Outdated versions can sometimes cause compatibility issues.
Reinstall the game: This can help if corrupted files are causing the problem.

If you continue to experience the freezing issue after trying these steps, please don't hesitate to contact our support team at info@skippyapps.com

reviews.review_description: It’s really good but also needs more development in the punching, and maybe more stuff, overall it’s great but just needs more stuff added, and in the pictures added in the game looked fun but I guess you guys upgraded it but more bad

developer_response.body: Hi, We understand your feedback about the punching mechanics needing further development and the desire for additional content. We are actively working on ways to improve the punching mechanics to provide a more satisfying and realistic experience.

reviews.review_description: Best VR boxing game.i really enjoyed it.Brillian feature specially face hitting with fully force I like it very much

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thanks for playing PunchVRX.

reviews.review_description:
The actual boxing is pretty fun but I'm pretty sure there's only one opponent.   Its challenging to knock him out but you can win by points and there is only one round. 

Replay value is in trying to knock him out which so far I only get him down to about 30%

Price is high with the lack of content but it's a keeper if you just want to wail on someone in the ring it's not bad.

developer_response.body: Dear user, Thanks for taking interest in our game. We are already working on more content & improvement of the game. If you have any more suggestions please share with us at admin@skippyapps.com
